name: harness
description: Autonomous startup builder — takes an idea, builds the entire company. 13 agents, 96 skills, TDD, Cubic code review, Figma design, deploy to Vercel/Railway.

plugins.name: startup-harness
plugins.description: Multi-agent harness that builds startups end-to-end. Founder interview, market research, product spec, design, TDD build loop, deploy, growth. Works for B2C, B2B SaaS, devtools, marketplaces, hardware+software, fintech, healthcare.
